summary: SINGLE_FOCUS pendulum diagram: WHITE pivot + GREY_B rod of length L=3 + BLUE bob at θ=0.75 rad. YELLOW Arc and MathTex mark θ. A WHITE gravity Arrow g points down from the bob. Decomposition via radial and tangential basis: RED Arrow for g cos θ (absorbed by tension) and GREEN Arrow for g sin θ (drives motion), with DashedLine closures back to g's tip. Right-bottom derivation: mLθ'' = −mg sin θ ⇒ θ'' = −(g/L)sin θ, the exact pendulum ODE, in YELLOW SurroundingRectangle.
